creator: bill@twwells.com
text:
In the page on mailing list archives, there is a link to get
	mailing lists by FTP, something like
	ftp://www.freebsd.org/pub/FreeBSD/doc/...; however, there is no doc
	directory out there!

Fix: 

Either put in a good link or remove the bad one.
How-To-Repeat: 	Click on the link.
